name: ratified decisions (ADR index)
description: apps/web is a thin Next.js App Router shell — web-only, logic stays extraction-ready in packages; RSC + Server Actions, TanStack Query where interactive (ADR-0002, ADR-0008).

name: onboarding-wiring
description: apps/web wires Creator Onboarding as a thin shell: browser Better Auth client (magicLink+emailOTP) for the cookie sign-in flow; useChat(DefaultChatTransport) maps UIMessage<->InterviewMessage via prepareSendMessagesRequest so the interview route Zod-validates one shape; profile-gen runs via runAgentStructured with a RESONANCE_FAKES-only injected canned tool-calling model (ai/test), dynamically imported to stay out of prod; commit redirects to the returned profileId because getCreatorProfileById is a profile-PK lookup with no by-user query exposed.
